deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
learningOutcomes:
Explain concept of Electrical Theory consist of Magnetism properties and Alternating
Current (AC) theory, Resistive (R), Capacitive (C), Inductive (L), Electrical Circuits, AC generator,
AC motor, be able to apply electricals principle in radio electrical Instrument (REI) field of
aircraft Maintenance. Have good attitudes, and habit desirable while operating in the AC. Motor
Control Systems, tasks and the trouble shooting with safety awareness.
objectives:
1. To provide knowledge of Magnetism properties and AC theory concerned, Resistive
(R), Capacitive (C) and Inductive (L) Circuits, and Theory concerned. The Inductive reactance
in an AC. Circuits, and combination of RLC Circuits of Both Series, and Parallel Circuit, AC.
Motors construction, Principal operation, and Types of AC Motors, Control and Power circuits
of each type of an AC. Motor Control Systems.
2. To explain the Knowledge concepts of Magnetism properties and AC theory
concerned, Resistive (R), Capacitive (C) and Inductive (L) Circuits, and Theory concerned. The
Inductive reactance in an AC. Circuits, and combination of RLC Circuits of Both Series, and
Parallel Circuit, AC. Motors construction, Principal operation, and Types of AC Motors, Control
and Power circuits of each type of an AC. Motor Control Systems.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. To apply the Knowledge concepts of Magnetism properties and AC theory
concerned, Resistive (R), Capacitive (C) and Inductive (L) Circuits, and Theory concerned. The
Inductive reactance in an AC. Circuits, and combination of RLC Circuits of Both Series, and
Parallel Circuit, AC. Motors construction, Principal operation, and Types of AC Motors, Control
and Power circuits of each type of an AC. Motor Control Systems.
competencies:
1. Codify Knowledge concepts about Magnetism properties and AC theory concerned,
Resistive (R), Capacitive (C) and Inductive (L) Circuits, and Theory concerned. The Inductive
reactance in an AC. Circuits, and combination of RLC Circuits of Both Series, and Parallel Circuit,
AC. Motors construction, Principal operation, and Types of AC Motors, Control and Power
circuits of each type of an AC. Motor Control Systems.
2. Perform wiring RLC circuits, and checking the circuit by measuring device correctly.
3. Perform functional test of aircraft DC Motor/Generator correctly
4. Perform wiring, checking the circuit Diagrams of motor control systems correctly.
สาขาวิชาช’างอากาศยาน
5. Perform testing of each type of Motor control systems correctly.
6. Demonstrate the staring procedures of any types of AC. Motors correctly.
7. Apply the concept of AC motor and concerned theory in aircraft maintenance.
description:
To study and practice about Magnetism, Inductance/Inductor, AC Theory, Resistive (R),
Capacitive (C) and Inductive (L) Circuits, Transformers, Filters, AC Generators, AC Motors that
consist of Construction, principles of operation and characteristics of AC. synchronous and
induction motors both single and polyphase and Methods of speed control and direction of
rotation.
สาขาวิชาช’างอากาศยาน
